title: Italian Polenta Wrap
description: A delicious and easy-to-make Italian-inspired wrap filled with creamy polenta, sweet sauce, and savory cheese. Perfect for a quick lunch or dinner.
instructions: Cook the polenta according to package instructions.
In a large pan, heat the sweet Italian sauce over medium heat.
Add the cooked polenta to the pan with the sauce and stir to combine.
Place the large wrap on a flat surface.
Spoon the polenta and sauce mixture onto the center of the wrap.
Sprinkle the shredded mozzarella cheese over the top.
Add some chopped fresh basil for extra flavor.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Fold the bottom half of the wrap up over the filling, then fold in the sides and roll the wrap up tightly.
Slice in half and serve immediately.
